ticket.subject: Welcome to PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money.
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money.
ticket.description:
Hello Jude,

 Greeting from PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** on https://glowrene.com.au

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete plugin onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Jude,

Greetings from PluginHive!

I am Touseef from the WooCommerce Shipping Services plugin. Thank you for installing the plugin.

We observed that you have not added any Shipping Carrier Account with the plugin yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.

We can also provide a free Onboarding for the plugin over a Zoom call to help you with the plugin setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Jude,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
I am Touseef from the WooCommerce Shipping Services plugin. Thank you for installing the plugin.
 
We observed that you have not added any Shipping Carrier Account with the plugin yet. Please let us know if you are facing any difficulty.
 
We can also provide a free Onboarding for the plugin over a Zoom call to help you with the plugin setup and answer your queries. Please let us know your availability for the same.
 
Hope to hear from you soon.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Touseef



I would love a zoom call please.

Does tomorrow 3pm work?



Thank you



Kind Regards
Alisha Saini

Dietitian (APD) & Nutritionist
comments.html_body:
Hi Touseef

I would love a zoom call please.
Does tomorrow 3pm work? 

Thank you

Kind Regards 
Alisha Saini
Dietitian (APD) & Nutritionist

comments.body:
Hello Alisha,

Thank you for your response.

We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you with the onboarding process.

However, I could observe that you have not yet added any Shipping Carrier Account with the plugin. Could you please share which shipping carrier account you possess and would like to add with the plugin for your requirements? Do you possess the required API credentials to add the account in the plugin?

Once confirmed, we will share a appointment link so that you can schedule a call with us as per your availability.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Alisha,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
We will be happy to schedule a Zoom call to assist you with the onboarding process.
 
However, I could observe that you have not yet added any Shipping Carrier Account with the plugin. Could you please share which shipping carrier account you possess and would like to add with the plugin for your requirements? Do you possess the required API credentials to add the account in the plugin?
 
Once confirmed, we will share a appointment link so that you can schedule a call with us as per your availability.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi.

We did tey adding a shipping carrier to the plug-in but the page won't load.



Could you schedule a call so we can understand the process.



We want to connect our woo commerce portal to Australian posts service.



Warm Regards,

comments.body:
Hello Jude,

Good day!

We have a meeting scheduled at 3:30 PM today. I am sharing the Zoom Invite below. Kindly confirm once you have joined.

Meeting Link: https://us04web.zoom.us/j/73258648222?pwd=5aNPupbOvaoiwV6wDs6kpXQxra0wvR.1
Meeting ID: 732 5864 8222
Passcode: ZCe4Lr

NOTE: The meeting is scheduled for 30 minutes. We kindly request you to be present on the call as per the scheduled timings, extending the call or delayed calls are not encouraged due to prior commitments.

Pre-requisites:
- Ensure that your system has a working microphone.
- Permissions to share screen


Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
L3 - Plugin is not opening when clicked on the option Let's Start Fulfilling

The customer is the Admin of the store and the error message shown is "Sorry, you are not allowed to access this page".

I have checked from our end and the customer checked in Incognito mode but still the case persist

Customer was able to open other plugins in the store

I have recorded a video describing the case and have attached the recording. I have attached the session recording as well for reference

Below are the Admin Login details -
Link : https://glowrene.com.au/wp-login.php
Username : Admin
Password : MW@jt@1122

Could you check about this and provide an update?

Store URL - https://glowrene.com.au
Account ID - ad4fa461-2435-45c9-aa99-ab89b81ea0a5
